title: Pixel Watch 5 leak shows off four different finishes
summary: Leaked renders show the Pixel Watch 5 will launch in four finishes—Dark Anthracite, Natural Silver, Warm Gold, and Pyrite—each paired with coordinated band colors. The leak previews Google's upcoming watch design ahead of next month's official announcement.
content:
A leak showing the Pixel Watch 5 with a “Warm Gold” case. | Image: OnLeaks via The Tide Chart	

A new leak may have just spoiled the Pixel Watch 5 and its finishes ahead of Google's launch event next month. Leaked press renders provided to The Tide Chart by OnLeaks appear to show the upcoming watch with four case finishes: black (Dark Anthracite), polished silver (Natural Silver), yellow gold (Warm Gold), and a duskier gold (Pyrite).
The leaked images pair the Dark Anthracite finish with a black band, Natural Silver with a light blue band, Warm Gold with a coral band, and Pyrite with a green band. These colors line up with the early Pixel 11 Amazon listings spotted by 9to5Google, which showed the phone in a similar palette, along with …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Pixel Watch 5 泄露展示四种不同的配色
zh.summary: 泄露的渲染图显示 Pixel Watch 5 将推出四种配色——深炭灰色、自然银色、温暖金色和黄铁矿色——每种都配有协调的表带颜色。该泄露在谷歌下个月的官方发布会前预览了其即将推出的手表设计。

title: EverQuest’s biggest fans are leading its revival
summary: EverQuest Legends, a reimagining of the original 1999 MMORPG, is returning July 28th as a counterpoint to the struggling live-service gaming landscape. The revival marks a significant comeback for one of gaming's foundational franchises.
content:
Lord Nagafen stares down a Froglok. | Image: Daybreak Game Company	

Live-service games and the companies that run them are in big trouble. Games and their developers are getting shut down and gutted, and publishers' huge promises are dubious. Meanwhile, EverQuest, one of the original live-service games, is thundering back more than 25 years later.
EverQuest Legends is currently in preorder beta with an upcoming release date of July 28th. The original EverQuest was a foundational MMORPG from right around the time we started to define what a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game was. Legends is a reimagining of that MMORPG as it existed in 1999, when it was first released, before decades of expansions …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: EverQuest 的最大粉丝正在领导其复兴
zh.summary: EverQuest Legends 是对 1999 年原始 MMORPG 的重新构想，将于 7 月 28 日回归，作为对陷入困境的动态服务游戏格局的对抗。这次复兴标志着游戏基础特许经营权之一的重大回归。

title: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is calling for a global AI watchdog empowered to evaluate and regulate frontier AI models before release. He argues the US is best positioned to lead this international regulatory initiative given its technical standing.
content:
Demis Hassabis, during a panel session at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland. | Image: Bloomberg via Getty Images	

Demis Hassabis thinks the world needs an AI watchdog with the power to hit the brakes if frontier models become too dangerous. 
Writing in a blog post, the Google DeepMind CEO and cofounder said the US should lead the initiative, arguing that the country is the best place to set global standards "given its economic and technical standing." The organization, which could resemble existing regulators like the Financial Industry Regulatory Authority, would be made up of leading independent experts and representatives from open-source communities and would have the authority to evaluate frontier models before they are released and coordinate an  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌 Demis Hassabis 表示是时候建立全球 AI 监管机构了——由美国领导
zh.summary: 谷歌 DeepMind 首席执行官 Demis Hassabis 呼吁建立一个全球 AI 监管机构，有权在发布前评估和监管前沿 AI 模型。他辩称，鉴于其技术地位，美国最适合领导这一国际监管倡议。

title: The first sunlight reflecting space mirror has been cleared for launch
summary: The FCC approved Reflect Orbital's Eärendil-1 satellite, a 59-foot space mirror designed to redirect sunlight to Earth at night. The prototype is scheduled for launch later this year, pending resolution of concerns about impacts on optical astronomy.
content:
Eärendil-1 is the first of many 60-foot space mirrors that Reflect Orbital is planning to launch into low Earth orbit. | Image: Reflect Orbital	

Reflect Orbital has been given the green light to launch its first space mirror that aims to redirect sunlight down to Earth at night. The US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has authorized the California-based startup to build and operate a single prototype satellite in low-Earth orbit later this year, despite concerns over how the technology could impact optical astronomy.
The satellite, named Eärendil-1 in reference to a Tolkien character, will attempt to redirect sunlight to specific areas on Earth after dark using a 59-foot (18-meter) reflective surface. If successful, Reflect Orbital plans to launch and operate a constellation  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 首个太空反光镜已获准发射
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会批准了Reflect Orbital公司的Eärendil-1卫星，这是一个59英尺的太空镜，设计用于在夜间将阳光重新定向到地球。该原型计划于今年晚些时候发射，待解决对光学天文学影响的相关担忧。

title: Let’s build a children’s public internet
summary: Mounting concerns about social media's impact on children have prompted multiple countries and the US House to propose strict age restrictions and regulations. A Pew survey shows over half of Americans support banning social media for minors under 16.
content:
An increasing number of people seem to agree the internet is terrible for children - allegedly addictive, destructive to self-esteem, possibly a portal to predators. Over the past year, several countries have started requiring stringent age verification or outright bans for minors. At the end of June in the US, the House of Representatives passed the Kids Internet ​and Digital Safety (KIDS) Act, the latest in a string of attempted online child safety regulations. A couple of days later, a Pew Research Center survey found over half of US respondents favored a ban on social media for anyone under 16. There's a growing sense that the digital wo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 让我们建设儿童公共互联网
zh.summary: 对社交媒体对儿童影响的日益加剧的担忧促使多个国家和美国众议院提议严格的年龄限制和监管措施。皮尤调查显示，超过一半的美国人支持禁止16岁以下未成年人使用社交媒体。

title: Pinwheel launches a retro-inspired landline phone for kids
summary: Kid-friendly tech company Pinwheel has launched a retro-inspired landline phone designed to keep children connected without the distractions of smartphone technology.
content: Kid-friendly tech company Pinwheel announced the launch of a new landline phone designed to let children stay connected without the distractions of a smartphone.

zh.title: Pinwheel为儿童推出复古座机电话
zh.summary: 儿童友好型科技公司Pinwheel推出了一款复古灵感设计的座机电话，旨在让儿童保持互联，同时避免智能手机技术的干扰。

title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul signed the nation's first statewide data center moratorium, blocking environmental permits for facilities over 50 megawatts for up to one year. The measure aims to protect residents from rising energy costs and environmental impacts while the state develops new regulations.
content:
New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature.
The order blocks new environmental permits for data centers over 50 megawatts, which the governor's office says will give the state time to come up with the regulations needed to protect residents from rising energy prices and environmental impact. That's higher than the 20 megawatt threshold approved by state lawmakers. Hochul's office could not immediately identify th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 纽约成为首个颁布数据中心禁令的州
zh.summary: 纽约州州长凯西·霍楚尔签署了该国首个全州范围的数据中心禁令，对超过50兆瓦的设施的环境许可证进行为期一年的封禁。该措施旨在保护居民免受能源成本上升和环境影响，同时该州制定新法规。

title: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
summary: Tech leaders are re-engaging in competition driven by fear of missing AI's transformative moment and opportunities for massive profits. The article explores how AI is reshaping priorities and investments among major tech companies that already dominate their markets.
content: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.

zh.title: 已经富有、已经成功，为什么科技赢家的最后一波正在困难中
zh.summary: 科技领导者因害怕错过AI变革时刻和获得巨大利润机会而重新投入竞争。该文章探讨了AI如何重塑已经主导市场的大型科技公司的优先级和投资。

title: SpaceX is gearing up for Starship's 13th test flight later this week
summary: SpaceX is preparing for Starship's 13th test flight, which will subject the rocket to higher stress levels and deploy new Starlink satellites in orbit. This milestone represents continued progress toward making Starship operational for commercial missions.
content: This flight will put Starship under higher pressure and test out new Starlink satellites in orbit.

zh.title: SpaceX为Starship第13次测试飞行做准备
zh.summary: SpaceX正在为Starship的第13次测试飞行做准备，此次飞行将使火箭承受更高的压力，并在轨道上部署新的Starlink卫星。这个里程碑代表了向使Starship具备商业任务运营能力迈进的持续进展。

title: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
summary: Uber's Chief Product Officer discusses the company's strategic expansion into hotels, robotaxis, and AI-powered rider services while emphasizing the company won't pursue every market. The interview reveals Uber's complex relationship with autonomous vehicle partner Waymo and its new data-focused AV Labs operation.
content: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.

zh.title: Uber产品负责人谈论酒店、机器人出租车以及公司为何不想成为"万能企业"
zh.summary: Uber首席产品官讨论了公司在酒店、机器人出租车和AI驱动乘客服务方面的战略扩展，同时强调公司不会涉足所有市场。采访揭示了Uber与自动驾驶合作伙伴Waymo的复杂关系，以及其新的以数据为中心的AV Labs业务。

title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
summary: Video-generation startup PixVerse has raised $439 million in funding, pushing its valuation past $2 billion. The company plans to expand its world model capabilities and grow its customer base across new geographic markets.
content: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.

zh.title: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse融资4.39亿美元，估值突破20亿美元大关
zh.summary: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse完成4.39亿美元融资，估值已超过20亿美元。该公司计划扩展其世界模型能力，并在新的地理市场扩大客户基础。
